end end w=#u return K(m)end,function(o,g)local K=c(g)local h=function(h,I,u,Q,m)return w(o,{h;I;u,Q,m},g,K)end return h end,function(o,g)local K=c(g)local h=function(h)return w(o,{h},g,K)end return h end,function(o,g)local K=c(g)local h=function(h,I,u,Q)return w(o,{h;I,u;Q},g,K)end return h end,function(o,g)local K=c(g)local h=function(h,I,u)return w(o,{h;I,u},g,K)end return h end return(G(960868+11828036,{}))(K(m))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[g(1021849+-965119)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
